refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns non-precise vertices in the topology.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns all vertices that are not rounded to the topology or given gridSize as a puntal geometry, optionally limiting the check to the area specified by the bbox parameter.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: SELECT ST_AsEWKT(g) FROM topology.ValidateTopologyPrecision( 'city_data', gridSize => 2, bbox => ST_MakeEnvelope(0,0,20,20) ) g; st_asewkt ---------------------- MULTIPOINT(9 6,9 14) (1 row)
